projects.title: Adoptify
projects.desc: UI/UX concept for an adoption-focused digital platform.
projects.overview: Adoptify is a product design concept centered on making adoption journeys clearer, friendlier, and easier to trust across mobile and web touchpoints.
goals: Design a friendlier adoption experience that feels safe and organized.
Simplify the path from browsing to inquiry and follow-through.
Create a reusable interface language for listings, profiles, and communication flows.

timeline.description: Reviewed adoption platform patterns and user frustrations.
Built content hierarchy around listings and action steps.
Developed end-to-end interface flow and UI patterns.
Prepared case study and gallery assets.

projects.title: DOST Laon
projects.desc: UI/UX work for a DOST-centered digital platform concept.
projects.overview: A structured and accessible digital experience concept around information, programs, and public-facing services tied to the DOST context.
goals: Create an intuitive disease reporting flow for field use.
Design a dashboard that surfaces actionable insights quickly.
Ensure accessibility for low-tech environments.

timeline.description: Field research with farmers and agricultural technicians.
Wireframes and prototype iterations.
Frontend implementation and dashboard build.
User testing and refinement.

projects.title: UMunity
projects.desc: Product design system for a school organization management platform covering events, communication, records, and coordination.
projects.overview: UMunity is a product design concept focused on school organization management through dashboards, events, records, announcements, and communication flows for both student members and organization officers.
goals: Centralize campus event listings and organization directories.
Create a seamless onboarding flow for students and organizations.
Build a scalable platform architecture for campus-wide adoption.

timeline.description: Student surveys and stakeholder interviews.
UX flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups.
Full-stack implementation with real-time features.
Beta launch with pilot organizations.

projects.title: Pietyl Management System
projects.desc: Product design system for Pietyl DigiLPG's internal management dashboard covering records, workflow, and operations monitoring.
projects.overview: A management dashboard design system for Pietyl DigiLPG focused on records, workflow tracking, and operations monitoring in a cleaner, more scalable interface.
goals: Design a management dashboard that simplifies complex operational data.
Create intuitive navigation for records, workflow, and monitoring modules.
Build a scalable interface system that adapts to future business needs.

timeline.description: Reviewed internal workflows and information hierarchy.
Mapped core modules and dashboard structure.
Built the interface system and reusable component patterns.
Prepared the system for case study and implementation handoff.

projects.title: Cosmic Remedies by Sia
projects.desc: A digital product platform and web experience for selling, managing, and securely delivering e-book content.
projects.overview: A responsive digital product platform built to present, sell, and securely deliver e-book content through a calm, customer-friendly web experience.
goals: Build a performant e-commerce platform with modern UX.
Integrate product management and inventory workflows.
Optimize for conversions and mobile shopping.

timeline.description: Requirements gathering and technical architecture.
Core e-commerce functionality and admin panel.
Animations, responsiveness, and performance optimization.
Production deployment and monitoring setup.

projects.title: UMunity Web
projects.desc: Responsive web implementation of the UMunity school organization management system with dashboard, modules, and reusable screen patterns.
projects.overview: A responsive front-end implementation of the UMunity product design system using React, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript across dashboard, events, records, announcements, and communication modules.
goals: Translate the approved Figma system into a responsive web implementation.
Build reusable components for dashboard, events, records, and communication modules.
Ensure the interface is usable across desktop and mobile breakpoints.

timeline.description: Prepared the responsive front-end structure and component architecture.
Built the dashboard, records, event, and communication screens.
Improved responsiveness, interaction states, and component consistency.
Prepared the implementation for portfolio presentation.

projects.title: Pietyl DigiLPG Web
projects.desc: Full-stack implementation of Pietyl DigiLPG's landing page and management system, built with Laravel, React, and MySQL.
projects.overview: A full-stack build combining a public-facing landing page with a working internal management system for LPG operations, records, and workflow monitoring.
goals: Build a simple, professional landing page for a long-standing LPG business.
Develop a functional management system for internal workflow and records.
Support multiple user roles including admin, accountant, cashier, rider, and customer.

timeline.description: Mapped the public site needs and internal operational workflows.
Built the landing page and core management modules with Laravel, React, and MySQL.
Checked dashboard flows, role-based access, and record handling.
Prepared the system for production rollout and portfolio presentation.

projects.title: Salin-Salin
projects.desc: Cultural heritage storytelling platform with interactive narratives.
projects.overview: A digital storytelling platform that preserves and shares Philippine cultural heritage through interactive narratives, multimedia archives, and community contributions.
goals: Create immersive storytelling experiences with rich media.
Build a community-contribution model for cultural preservation.
Ensure the platform is accessible and performant.

timeline.description: Content strategy and narrative structure design.
Visual design system and prototyping.
Platform development with interactive features.
Content population and public launch.

projects.title: Sakuragi Tailoring Shop Management System
projects.desc: Management system for tailoring shop operations, customer records, job orders, and production tracking.
projects.overview: A tailoring shop management system designed to organize customer information, measurements, job orders, fitting schedules, and production tracking in one place.
goals: Centralize tailoring shop records, measurements, and active job orders.
Make order tracking easier for staff from intake through release.
Reduce manual errors in scheduling, customer lookup, and production monitoring.

timeline.description: Defined the shop workflow around customers, measurements, orders, and fittings.
Mapped the screens and database structure for daily tailoring operations.
Built the JavaFX application and integrated the MySQL-backed modules.
Adjusted search, status updates, and monitoring flows for staff use.

projects.title: HandyMan
projects.desc: Java desktop application for booking services, hiring skilled workers, and renting tools.
projects.overview: A Java-based desktop application designed to streamline service booking, worker hiring, and tool rental through a rich JavaFX interface and database-backed workflow.
goals: Streamline service booking and tool rental processes.
Provide a rich desktop UI experience with JavaFX.
Manage user profiles, payments, and order history.

timeline.description: Defined the booking, directory, cart, and receipt workflows.
Planned the desktop application screens and database structure.
Built the JavaFX application and integrated the MySQL-backed features.
Prepared the project for presentation with setup instructions and demo screens.
